customAttributes.description:
If a creature dying causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Creature tokens you control have vigilance and lifelink.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Her uncanny predictions of Phyrexian movements saved countless lives, though she never revealed the source of her information.

details.setName: March of the Machine: Multiverse Legends
